description.value: Price 12,160 gp; Slot armor; CL 5th; Weight 15 lbs.; Aura faint transmutation DESCRIPTION This +1 leather armor consists of wolf skins sewn together with sinew. When the wearer rages, he automatically turns into a Medium wolf, as if using change shape ( beast shape I ). The armor melds with his new form as normal, but the armorâs enhancement bonus changes into a +1 enhancement bonus to her natural armor. When the rage ends, the wearer reverts to his own form. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 6,160 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells beast shape I
